slashCommands.name: edit
slashCommands.description: Edit code - asks Claude for edits to the selected code

slashCommands.name: comment
slashCommands.description: Add a comment - asks Claude to explain the selected code

slashCommands.name: doc
slashCommands.description: Generate documentation - creates JSDoc/Go doc comments

customCommands.name: test
customCommands.prompt: Write unit tests for the selected code following Go testing conventions

customCommands.name: refactor
customCommands.prompt: Refactor the selected code to improve readability and performance while maintaining functionality
